message:
chore: add agent probe files and .tmp/ to gitignore

Ignore .tmp_write_probe, .tmp_* glob (agent scratch files), and .tmp/
directory (rustc temp compilation artifacts) that accumulate from
concurrent agent sessions and should never be committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -87,3 +87,8 @@ session_export.html
 /storage.sqlite3
 /storage.sqlite3-wal
 /storage.sqlite3-shm
+
+# Agent probe/scratch files and temp directories
+.tmp_write_probe
+.tmp_*
+.tmp/
